/usr/local/mdc_sdk_llvm/dp_gea/mdc_cross_compiler/bin/clang++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG  -shared -Wl,-soname,libxh265_rtp_pusher.so.1 -o libxh265_rtp_pusher.so.1.0.0 CMakeFiles/xh265_rtp_pusher.dir/src/mdc_yaml_node.cpp.o CMakeFiles/xh265_rtp_pusher.dir/src/xh265_rtp_pusher/sensorimageserviceinterface_client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/xh265_rtp_pusher.dir/src/xh265_rtp_pusher/sensorimageserviceinterface_client_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/xh265_rtp_pusher.dir/src/xh265_rtp_pusher/xh265_rtp_pusher_swc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/xh265_rtp_pusher.dir/src/xh265_rtp_pusher_logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/xh265_rtp_pusher.dir/__/__/generated/src/ara/adsfi/sensorimageserviceinterface_common.cpp.o   -L/usr/local/mdc_sdk_llvm/dp_gea/mdc_cross_compiler/sysroot/usr/lib/mdc/base-plat  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/mdc_sdk_llvm/dp_gea/mdc_cross_compiler/sysroot/usr/lib/mdc/base-plat: -lascend_hal -Wl,--no-as-needed -Wl,--as-needed -lyaml /usr/local/mdc_sdk_llvm/dp_gea/mdc_cross_compiler/sysroot/usr/lib64/liblog.so.1.0.0 -lara_per /usr/local/mdc_sdk_llvm/dp_gea/mdc_cross_compiler/sysroot/usr/lib64/libara_com.so.320500.0.0 /usr/local/mdc_sdk_llvm/dp_gea/mdc_cross_compiler/sysroot/usr/lib64/libvrtf_vcc.so.320500.0.0 /usr/local/mdc_sdk_llvm/dp_gea/mdc_cross_compiler/sysroot/usr/lib64/libJsonParser.so.1.0.0 /usr/local/mdc_sdk_llvm/dp_gea/mdc_cross_compiler/sysroot/usr/lib64/libCrc.so.1.0.0 /usr/local/mdc_sdk_llvm/dp_gea/mdc_cross_compiler/sysroot/usr/lib64/libara_core.so.321500.0.0 -lpthread -ldp_adapter -lplog /usr/local/mdc_sdk_llvm/dp_gea/mdc_cross_compiler/sysroot/usr/lib64/libauth_service_client.so.320500.0.0 -lsecurec /usr/local/mdc_sdk_llvm/dp_gea/mdc_cross_compiler/sysroot/usr/lib64/liblogging.so.1.0.0 -lddscore -lddscpp -lsomeip -lrbs_event /usr/local/mdc_sdk_llvm/dp_gea/mdc_cross_compiler/sysroot/usr/lib64/libE2EXf_CM.so.1.0.0 -lsecoc_library /usr/local/mdc_sdk_llvm/dp_gea/mdc_cross_compiler/sysroot/usr/lib64/librm.so.1.0.0
